creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
Compiling camino v1.1.6
   Compiling wasm-bindgen v0.2.92
   Compiling regex v1.10.4
   Compiling wasm-bindgen-macro-support v0.2.92
error[E0080]: evaluation of constant value failed
  --> /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/gleam/work/gleam-1.2.0/cargo-crates/ring-0.17.8/src/cpu/intel.rs:28:9
   |
28 |         assert!(cfg!(target_feature = "sse") && cfg!(target_feature = "sse2"));
   |         ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ the evaluated program panicked at 'assertion failed: cfg!(target_feature = "sse") && cfg!(target_feature = "sse2")', /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/gleam/work/gleam-1.2.0/cargo-crates/ring-0.17.8/src/cpu/intel.rs:28:9
   |
   = note: this error originates in the macro `assert` (in Nightly builds, run with -Z macro-backtrace for more info)

   Compiling mime v0.3.17
   Compiling adler v1.0.2
   Compiling capnpc v0.14.9
   Compiling miniz_oxide v0.7.2
For more information about this error, try `rustc --explain E0080`.
error: could not compile `ring` (lib) due to 1 previous error
warning: build failed, waiting for other jobs to finish...
*** Error code 101

despite having:

# add sse sse2 target-features only on i386
RUSTFLAGS+=   --cap-lints=warn ${ARCH:S/i386/YES/:C/^[a-z].*//:S/YES/-C target-feature=+sse,+sse2/}

in makefile.
